raw:
```json
{
  "primary_series": "WPU1178",
  "rationale": "PPI for semiconductors and related devices (WPU1178) is the closest FRED proxy for US semiconductor prices. Import-specific ASP indices for chips are not cleanly available on FRED; PPI captures domestic producer prices which co-move with import ASPs under tariff pass-through. Monthly frequency.",
  "threshold_zscore": 2.0,
  "window_obs": 3,
  "lookback_years": 40,
  "direction": "up"
}
```

parsed.rationale: PPI for semiconductors and related devices (WPU1178) is the closest FRED proxy for US semiconductor prices. Import-specific ASP indices for chips are not cleanly available on FRED; PPI captures domestic producer prices which co-move with import ASPs under tariff pass-through. Monthly frequency.

raw:
```json
{
  "primary_series": "A466RC1Q027SBEA",
  "rationale": "No clean FRED series tracks US OEM hardware gross margins directly. A466RC1Q027SBEA (corporate profits in nondurable/durable manufacturing) is the closest broad proxy, but it is noisy and not hardware-specific. Margin compression episodes are better identified via equity/earnings data not on FRED. Setting threshold to capture sharp negative profit swings in manufacturing as an imperfect analog.",
  "threshold_zscore": 1.8,
  "window_obs": 4,
  "lookback_years": 40,
  "direction": "down"
}
```

parsed.rationale: No clean FRED series tracks US OEM hardware gross margins directly. A466RC1Q027SBEA (corporate profits in nondurable/durable manufacturing) is the closest broad proxy, but it is noisy and not hardware-specific. Margin compression episodes are better identified via equity/earnings data not on FRED. Setting threshold to capture sharp negative profit swings in manufacturing as an imperfect analog.

parsed.rationale: No FRED series cleanly proxies a reallocation of semiconductor foundry capex away from China toward TSMC/Samsung/US fabs. Candidates considered: aggregate nonresidential fixed investment (too broad), semiconductor shipments/billings (not on FRED with sufficient history), industrial production for semiconductors IPG3344S (measures output not capex reallocation and is US-only).
